notes: Stabilization progressing. DAU recovered to 1.15M (96% of baseline). NA fully recovered. EU DAU at 310K — still 11% below baseline but trending upward week-over-week. EU D7 retention at 38.0% (target 42%, but improving from 28.1% nadir in W11). Cosmetic rebalance launched (DLR-0037): 120 items repriced with transparent regional parity. Community reception cautiously positive. LATAM showing unexpected strength — DAU and ARPPU both slightly above baseline, driven by Brazilian tournament viewership halo. Refund rate normalizing at 1.4% (approaching 0.4% baseline). SAI at 45 — infrastructure stable post-APAC expansion. DRIFT-0016 (regulatory) still active: BfJ formal review expected within 60 days, French DGCCRF monitoring. DRIFT-0018 (sponsor exposure) still active: renegotiation with NovaTech and Pulse Energy ongoing, combined $30M at risk. DRIFT-0019 flagged churn model degradation — W11 churn event broke the predictive model, needs retraining on post-crisis cohorts. DLR-0038 ratified churn model rebuild with 21-day timeline.
